content.en:
Rumble!!!!

The extradimensional storm swept through the territory of 7362, and countless creatures and resources were reduced to ashes under the extradimensional storm.

And at this time, Ye Tian forcibly entered the Death Void.

He did have a copy body in the Death Void before, but he had returned before the extradimensional storm had descended, and now he had re-entered.

As soon as he entered the Void of Death, the power of the endless extradimensional storm crushed his body.

At this moment, Ye Tian was very uncomfortable, as if he was under endless attacks.

He was constantly urging a variety of super secret treasure talismans, and he was able to bear it.

"Ordinary peak realm gods, entering the Death Void at this time, are almost certain to die. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And he also discovered that with his own perception, he was limited countless times, and he couldn't explore far at all, and some special super secret treasures couldn't spy on how far away.

"It seems that we have to rely on the extradimensional thing of the weird blood pupil. "

Ye Tian urged the Strange Blood Pupil Technique, and in an instant, his gaze penetrated the extradimensional storm and spied into a very long distance.

In this way, the distance he explored in the extradimensional storm was farther than the half-step extradimensional realm, and there was still hope of finding the extradimensional elves.

Of course.

His strength is far inferior to that of the super-dimensional elf, any super-dimensional elf can kill him in an instant, but as long as you find the super-dimensional elf, you can spy on the super-dimensional patterns on the super-dimensional elf and comprehend the super-dimensional mystery on the super-dimensional elf.

Moreover, with the effect of the Strange Blood Pupil Technique, it may be possible to make it impossible for the weaker extradimensional elves to detect him.

"Start exploring!"

Ye Tian set off to explore one area after another.

However, his speed is slow, and he can't escape quickly in the midst of extradimensional storms, and he can't explore much in a short period of time.

And.

He also found that many places had been destroyed by the extradimensional storm, but also made many dangers disappear.

In the past, it was possible to be attracted by the illusion of certain treasures, which led to a desperate situation.

But under the impact of the extradimensional storm, those illusions naturally did not exist, and many dangers were exposed one by one.

After Ye Tian snooped with the Strange Blood Pupil Technique, as long as he sensed the death crisis, he would no longer approach.

In such a situation, he is not easy to fall.

Otherwise, he would not be able to escape from any encounter with a half-step extradimensional creature in the extradimensional realm.

"There are so many dangerous places in the Death Void, I just found some territories, and I found more than fifty places that made me feel death, most of which hid extradimensional creatures in the half-step extradimensional realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

These half-step extradimensional creatures of the extradimensional realm, he couldn't perceive it before, but under the impact of the extradimensional storm, their camouflage was useless, and the old nest was exposed.

However, they didn't dare to run around, they stayed there all the time, and they couldn't discover Ye Tian's weird blood pupil technique, so they naturally didn't know about Ye Tian's existence.

The years passed.

Ye Tian searched for a lot of places in the territory of Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two, but he did not find any traces of the extradimensional elves.

However, he didn't give up, he really couldn't hold on, so he went back to change to a replica body and let other replica bodies explore.

In this way, tens of trillions of solstice era years have passed.

Compared to an extradimensional era, this amount of time is nothing.

And Ye Tian explored many places, although he didn't find a superdimensional elf, but he found a lot of good things.

"Fragments of six high-level extra-dimensional things, seventy-two medium-level extra-dimensional things and fragments, and a large number of low-level extradimensional things!"

This is Ye Tian's harvest of extradimensional things, and there are some other good things.

In terms of total value, it is no less than 50 million Galanbao coins.

Of course, that is, he can avoid the extradimensional creatures of the half-step extradimensional realm far away, otherwise even if the half-step extradimensional realm comes, he may have to encounter danger and even fall and die.

But he also consumed some copy body, after all, he kept urging the weird blood pupil, and his body couldn't bear it, and he would eventually fall.

Fortunately, the cost of condensing and copying his body is not large, and the harvest is naturally extremely rich.

But Ye Tian's desire for these resources is not strong, what he needs is a superdimensional elf, as long as he finds a superdimensional elve, it will help him comprehend the power of superdimensionality.

For him, only comprehending the power of the extradimensional is the most important thing.

"We have to keep looking for extradimensional elves!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

On this day, when Ye Tian was exploring an area, he suddenly sensed strong battle fluctuations.

Rumble!!!!

This fluctuation was far beyond Ye Tian's imagination, it was definitely two powerhouses far beyond him who were killing.

Ye Tian immediately went over, and then used the Strange Blood Pupil Technique to snoop.

Soon, a picture appeared in his eyes.

The side of the battle is a half-step extra-dimensional realm powerhouse, and it is definitely not an ordinary half-step extra-dimensional realm, its strength is more than a hundred times stronger than the blood shadow puppet!

On the other side of the battle are elves covered in extradimensional patterns.

"'It's an extradimensional elf!!"

Ye Tian was excited.

The strength of this extra-dimensional elf is not very powerful, and he has not yet stepped into the super-dimensional realm.

Obviously, that half-step extradimensional realm wanted to kill or capture this extradimensional elf.

"The half-step extra-dimensional realm cannot cross the boundary extra-dimensional barrier, but this half-step extra-dimensional realm has come, it seems that it was used by special means to come, and the origin is definitely not ordinary. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He did not approach the battlefield, otherwise he would have been discovered by them.

With his strength, wherever their opponent is, the aftermath can bombard him countless times.

Therefore, he could only use the Strange Blood Pupil Technique to snoop.

Moreover, facing the battle of observing the half-step transcendent realm, he can also observe and comprehend the extradimensional power displayed by them (Li Mohao), which helps him to comprehend the superdimensional power.

Other than that.

The Weird Blood Pupil Technique can also directly observe the extra-dimensional lines on the super-dimensional elves, which is the biggest gain.

Although the distance is a little far, the observation effect is not very good, but it is better than my own silent understanding, I don't know how many times disturbed.

"Hopefully they'll fight for a few more years, so I can learn a lot more. "

In this way, Ye Tian was here to comprehend, observe the superdimensional patterns on the superdimensional elves, and comprehend their battles, and his understanding of the superdimensional power became deeper and deeper.

For him, this is a big opportunity, maybe he can only meet this once, and naturally he can't give up.

Meanwhile.

His other replica bodies also came here, and if their battle was over and the extradimensional elves were not caught, he was also ready to approach the superdimensional elves to send them to death, and to comprehend the superdimensional power of the superdimensional elves in a more intuitive way.
